channel.title: Beginner Tutorial on UnityChip Verification
channel.description: Recent content in Beginner Tutorial on UnityChip Verification

item.title: Lecture 1: Basics of Chip Verification
item.description: Understand the basics of chip verification

item.title: Lecture 2 · Installation and Usage of Picker
item.description: Introduces the installation and use of Picker with Python as an example

item.title: Lecture 3: Installation and Usage of Toffee
item.description: Master the basic process and key technologies of using Toffee for chip verification, laying the foundation for independently completing verification tasks in the future.

item.title: Lecture 5 · Case Study: Nutshell Cache
item.description: Introduces how to start a verification task, complete Chisel-to-Verilog conversion, and verify Nutshell Cache requirements
